## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and discuss the 2026 renewal proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Renewal Proposed:** A 4DK/month renewal is proposed, maintaining current scope (editorial, programmatic, thought leadership) and adding free, perpetual access to the new "Check That" tool.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The primary goal is to reposition Airbyte as an "AI infrastructure company" by shifting content from data engineering to AI engineers and agent-building.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Content Evolution:** The focus is now on creating deep, technical content (code examples, GitHub templates) to engage the new AI engineer audience, moving beyond high-level SEO articles.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Performance:** January traffic was strong (near 1:1 sessions:visitors), but conversion tracking for the private preview is a gap. This will be simplified by the public beta launch next week.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Pivot: Repositioning Airbyte

  - [**Goal:** Shift market perception from a data engineering tool to an "AI infrastructure company."](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Rationale:** AI agents need connectors to access business data (e.g., Salesforce) at scale, creating a major infrastructure opportunity for Airbyte.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [**Audience Shift:** Expand focus from data engineers to AI/software engineers building agents.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [Create technical content that agents can discover and recommend (e.g., "Use Airbyte for connectors").](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [Compete directly with tools like Composio and Merge as the product matures.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)

### Performance & Wins

  - [**January Traffic:** Near 1:1 sessions:visitors → indicates high user intent.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**Content Visibility:** An article published Friday already appeared in Google's AI Overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [**Programmatic Pages:** Agent Connector pages were built in two days, proving a scalable model for future content.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [**Editorial Cadence:** "Agentic data" content is doubling to 12 articles/week for Feb-Mar to accelerate growth.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**Team Stability:** Mario praised the account stability since Erik took over and requested continuity.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [**Challenge:** Current "agentic data" content is too high-level for the new AI engineer audience.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create more technical content with code examples and GitHub templates.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Ideation:** Mario will bring in a solution engineer for a technical ideation session.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [**Research:** Mario will provide Gong call transcripts to inform content strategy with direct customer feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

### Renewal Proposal

  - [**Cost:** 4DK/month.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [**Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
      - [**Editorial:** 12 "agentic data" articles/week (Feb-Mar).](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Programmatic:** 25–100 pieces/week (e.g., Agent Use Cases pages, TLDR refreshes).](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
      - [**Thought Leadership:** 1–2 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
      - [**SEO & Attribution:** Ongoing technical support and semi-annual content audits.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [**New Tool:** Free, perpetual access to "Check That," a new content intelligence tool.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
      - [**Note:** Currently feature-parity with Scrunch; will evolve to match Profound's ideation features.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mario:**](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
      - [Provide Gong call transcripts to inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
      - [Confirm renewal decision with Tanmay by Feb 10.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [Schedule a technical content ideation session with Mario and the solution engineer.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [Send Kushal a brief template to streamline thought leadership topic development.](https://fathom.video/share/xxBS5G96WCHnBvLHpDXRpT_aTRVR2G21?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
